title: Asking for Help 请求帮忙
scene: Emma搬家时请朋友来帮忙整理东西。

lines.en: Ryan, can you help me with something?
lines.zh: 瑞安，你能帮我一个忙吗？

lines.en: Of course, Emma! What do you need?
lines.zh: 当然可以，艾玛！你需要什么？

lines.en: I'm moving to a new house this weekend.
That's exciting! How can I help?
lines.zh: 太令人兴奋了！我能怎么帮？

lines.en: Can you help me pack my books and toys?
lines.zh: 你能帮我打包书和玩具吗？

lines.en: Sure! Do you have any boxes?
Yes, I bought some big boxes yesterday.
lines.zh: 有的，我昨天买了一些大箱子。

lines.en: Great! I can come on Saturday morning.
lines.zh: 太好了！我周六早上可以过来。

lines.en: That's perfect! I'll make some sandwiches for lunch.
lines.zh: 太好了！我中午做些三明治。

lines.en: You're the best! I'll see you on Saturday!
